# `!echo`

**Category:** control

Log a templated message to the run output; no host changes.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `msg` | string | yes | Message to print (template-expanded). |

## Examples

```yaml
- !echo
  msg: Deploying to {{ inventory_host }} ({{ jet_arch }})
```
